name: Pumpkin Ice Cream Pie with Caramel Pecan Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the crushed gingersnap cookies and melted butter. Mix well and press firmly into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, stir 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon into the softened vanilla ice cream. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
3. Freeze for at least 3 hours or until firm.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the brown sugar, ginger, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, cloves, and pumpkin. Mix well and fold in the whipped cream. Spoon the mixture over the ice cream layer in the crust.
5. Return to the freezer and let stand at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes before serving.
6. For the sauce, in a small saucepan, combine the caramel topping and chopped pecans. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thoroughly heated. Serve warm over the pie.
